scripts.dev:backend: node -e "const fs=require('fs'), path=require('path'), cp=require('child_process'); const d=path.join(process.cwd(), 'backend'); const p=process.platform==='win32'?path.join(d,'venv','Scripts','python.exe'):path.join(d,'venv','bin','python'); cp.spawn(fs.existsSync(p)?p:'python', ['-m','uvicorn','app.main:app','--port','5000','--reload'], {stdio:'inherit', shell:true, cwd:d});"
